title: Revert "Support Windows11 As A sshuttle Server"
body:
Reverts sshuttle/sshuttle#993

This change was made in error. See discussion in #993.

Explore the source code to identify the files and functions to modify.

step_plan.summary: Revert Windows11-specific sshuttle Windows server support by restoring pre-Windows11 Windivert-based behavior in the windivert method and aligning server startup paths accordingly. The plan focuses on removing Windows11-specific gating and filter logic while preserving the legacy Windows behavior.

steps.operation: Revert Windows11-specific is_supported gating to reflect legacy Windows behavior
steps.reason: Restore pre-Windows11 platform gating by removing Windows11-specific constraints or flags that altered support checks.
steps.side_effects: May broaden or revert supported Windows versions; downstream code paths relying on Windows11-specific gating should be reviewed; tests referencing Windows11 gating may need updates.

steps.operation: Restore prior feature set in get_supported_features
steps.reason: Undo Windows11-specific feature toggles (e.g., DNS, IPv6, loopback proxy) to align with older Windows behavior.
steps.side_effects: Tests or docs that assumed new Windows11 features may fail; ensure clients are compatible with the legacy feature set.

steps.reason: Return to the pre-Windows11 outbound traffic filtering logic used by Windivert, removing Windows11-specific filter construction steps.
steps.side_effects: Outbound traffic capture behavior may change; potential ripple effects on DNS/UDP handling; update relevant tests.

steps.operation: Revert _ingress_divert to pre-Windows11 packet handling semantics
steps.reason: Restore older ingress packet handling and filter semantics that were used before Windows11-specific changes.
steps.side_effects: Inbound path behavior may shift; ensure tests cover pre-Windows11 ingress paths and adjust any Windows11-specific expectations.
